risks.risk: Local/internal admin DLQ redrive controls can be mistaken for production Admin Console readiness.
risks.mitigation: Docs and evidence explicitly state no real DB, Redis, Kafka, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness claim.

risks.risk: Admin DLQ retry responses must avoid raw external payloads, secrets, tokens, and connection strings.
risks.mitigation: Admin DLQ redrive tests assert allowlisted safe metadata only and unsafe payload fail-closed behavior.

risks.risk: Retry controls are local/internal and do not include production rate limits or multi-admin audit policy.
risks.mitigation: Docs and residual risks state rate limits and multi-admin audit policy remain future scoped work.
